points.point1: Designed the system with a strong focus on scalability, clear separation of concerns, and predictable state management, applying well-defined patterns across frontend and backend.
points.point2: Implemented a true offline-first approach, ensuring data consistency and uninterrupted user experience regardless of network connectivity.
points.point3: Designed the project with a balanced focus on user experience and technical robustness, weighing architectural decisions, performance, and usability.
points.point4: Took full ownership of the stack and architectural decisions, treating the project as a real product from end to end.

points.point1: Built a full-stack PWA, installable on iOS and Android, delivering a web experience close to native.
points.point2: Implemented secure user authentication and reliable data persistence, using MongoDB as the storage layer.
points.point3: Applied schema-based data validation and access control with Zod, establishing clear boundaries between input, authorization, and domain logic.
points.point4: Designed a cursor-based pagination strategy to ensure efficient and scalable backend data access.

points.point1: Built a full-stack social media PWA using the MERN stack, with a strong focus on smooth navigation and continuous user experience.
points.point2: Implemented schema-based data validation and access control with Zod, ensuring consistency across user interactions.
points.point3: Designed an infinite scrolling experience using cursor-based pagination, enabling efficient and progressive content loading.
points.point4: Designed a SwiftUI-inspired layout system based on vertical and horizontal stacks for flexible UI composition.

points.point1: Developed a full-stack MERN application for task management, with a strong emphasis on domain organization and structural clarity.
points.point2: Designed a well-structured REST API using Express and Mongoose, clearly separating routes, controllers, and data models.
points.point3: Implemented token-based authentication (JWT), ensuring consistent access control across application resources.
points.point4: Built a responsive, component-based React interface, prioritizing reusability and long-term maintainability.

points.point1: Created and published a React package on NPM inspired by SwiftUI’s stack-based layout system, focusing on simplicity and developer ergonomics.
points.point2: Designed a declarative API around components such as VerticalStack and HorizontalStack, reducing layout composition complexity.
points.point3: Built the package to be reusable and consistent, adopting it as the foundational layout system across multiple personal projects.
points.point4: Authored clear documentation and design decisions to support adoption, maintenance, and ongoing iteration.

points.point1: Developed a weather forecast application using React, marking my first experience consuming external APIs in a modern frontend.
points.point2: Integrated separate APIs for location search and weather data, coordinating multiple asynchronous requests within the application flow.
points.point3: Implemented a responsive interface with dynamic data updates based on the user’s selected location.
points.point4: Structured the project to maintain clear separation between data logic, application state, and visual presentation.

points.point1: Developed a digital sticky notes application using vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, with a focus on simplicity and usability.
points.point2: Implemented client-side state management to support real-time creation, editing, and removal of notes.
points.point3: Integrated browser local storage (LocalStorage) to ensure data persistence across sessions.
points.point4: Added a CSV export feature, enabling data portability and reuse outside the application.

points.point1: Developed an interactive CSS box-shadow generator using only vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
points.point2: Implemented real-time style updates, providing immediate visual feedback as parameters are adjusted.
points.point3: Designed configurable controls for all relevant box-shadow properties, enabling experimentation and visual learning.
